mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.duration_days, c.auth_type AS verification_type, c.badge_name AS achievement_badge_id, c.is_active, c.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id) AS participant_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp2 WHERE cp2.challenge_id = c.id AND cp2.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}) > 0
0
AS joined_by_me,
(SELECT cp3.status FROM challenge_participants cp3 WHERE cp3.challenge_id = c.id AND cp3.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} LIMIT 1)
NULL
AS my_status,
(SELECT cp4.achieved_days FROM challenge_participants cp4 WHERE cp4.challenge_id = c.id AND cp4.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} LIMIT 1)
0
AS my_achieved_days FROM challenges c WHERE c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.duration_days, c.auth_type AS verification_type, c.badge_name AS achievement_badge_id, c.is_active, c.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id) AS participant_count,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp2 WHERE cp2.challenge_id = c.id AND cp2.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}) > 0
0
AS joined_by_me FROM challenges c WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.duration_days, c.auth_type AS verification_type, c.badge_name AS achievement_badge_id, c.is_active, c.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id) AS participant_count, 1 AS joined_by_me, cp_me.status AS my_status, cp_me.achieved_days AS my_achieved_days FROM challenges c JOIN challenge_participants cp_me ON cp_me.challenge_id = c.id AND cp_me.`쉼표번호` = #{commaNo} ORDER BY cp_me.joined_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND `쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenge_participants (challenge_id, `쉼표번호`, achieved_days, status) VALUES (#{challengeId}, #{쉼표번호}, #{achievedDays}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM challenge_participants WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND `쉼표번호` = #{commaNo}
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description, c.duration_days, c.auth_type AS verification_type, c.badge_name AS achievement_badge_id, c.is_active, c.created_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.challenge_id = c.id) AS participant_count FROM challenges c ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE challenges SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
